metadata.description: Secure coding guideline skills for vibe coders. Review code for vulnerabilities, auto-fix security issues, run pre-deployment checklists, and generate secure coding prompts.

plugins.name: kktv-en
plugins.description: Secure coding skills (English). start(security audit with categorized reports), fix(auto-fix vulnerabilities), check(pre-deployment checklist), guide(generate secure coding prompts for AI tools).

plugins.name: kktv-ko
plugins.description: 시큐어코딩 스킬 (한국어). start(보안 검토 + 카테고리별 보고서), fix(취약점 자동 수정), check(배포 전 체크리스트), guide(AI에게 안전한 코드 요청 가이드 생성).
